name: hud_ui_counter_release_state_images
description: HudUiCounter::ReleaseStateImages releases the three counter state images through zVid_Image::ReleaseIfNotDefault and clears their slots.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ReleaseStateImages@HudUiCounter@@QAEXXZ at 0x40f0f0 still fails: 182 unmasked mismatches, 20 relocation bytes masked, 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 58 bytes, VC object symbol size 208 bytes.
